case_title: LISA CRAIB MCMILLAN VS. DR.ANTHONY CUCALON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCMILLAN, LISA CRAIB IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CUCALON, DR.ANTHONY DBA CUCALON ORTHODONTICS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MCMILLAN, LISA CRAIB AS TO DEFENDANT CUCALON, DR.ANTHONY DBA CUCALON ORTHODONTICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0.0 SERVED AUG-12-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CUCALON, DR.ANTHONY DBA CUCALON ORTHODONTICS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-25-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF LISA CRAIB MCMILLAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DR. ANTHONY CUCALON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)
